tagline: Serverless compute for notebooks, jobs, and Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines now uses an upgraded runtime, which roughly corresponds to Databricks Runtime 17.1.
what_it_does: Serverless compute for notebooks, jobs, and Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines now uses an upgraded runtime, which roughly corresponds to Databricks Runtime 17.1.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Serverless compute for notebooks, jobs, and Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines now uses an upgraded runtime, which roughly corresponds to Databricks Runtime 17.1.
